docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOEL ANKER--OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARIO RAMIREZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIANS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONTIVEROS, ALMA $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $680.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
